description: ADAudit Plus is running at http://localhost:8081/ (login: admin/Admin@2024). Configure ADAudit Plus to support your organization's compliance program by implementing the following requirements. Configure the SMTP mail server using server smtp.internal.corp, port 465, SSL security, from address adaudit-noreply@internal.corp, and admin email itadmin@internal.corp. Create a compliance auditor technician account with username gdpr_auditor, full name GDPR Compliance Auditor, email gdpr.audit@internal.corp, password GDPR@2025!, and the Auditor role. Schedule a daily PDF report named 'User Account Changes - Daily' sent to it-team@internal.corp and a weekly PDF report named 'Privileged Access Weekly' sent to security@internal.corp every Wednesday. Configure Event Collection Status alerts to be sent to noc@internal.corp every 4 hours.
